name: Value Stream Mapping
what_it_is: A lean tool visualizing all steps in a process that deliver value - and identifying waste between them.
core_mechanic: Map every step from input to output. Record time in each step and wait time between steps. Calculate value-added ratio (work time / total elapsed time). Identify biggest wait/waste sources. Design future state. Implement highest-impact change first.
when_to_use: A workflow feels inefficient but can't pinpoint where the waste is / Elapsed time much longer than actual work time / Handoff problems between people or teams
when_not_to_use: Knowledge work hard to map linearly (use Systems Thinking) / Strategy questions
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps top 5-7 workflow steps, estimates relative wait times between each, identifies the highest-waste handoff, proposes the one intervention with highest leverage on cycle time.
